Title: CREATE TABLE FROM LOADER
Description: Define a new table from the results of a (Python) loader function. By default the table will be populated with the data of the loader function. Specify WITH NO DATA to only create the table.
Note : This command is MonetDB specific.
See also: CREATE LOADER , COPY LOADER INTO FROM , COMMENT ON TABLE , COMMENT ON COLUMN , DROP TABLE .
Associated system tables: information_schema.tables , sys.tables where type = 0
Examples:
CREATE TABLE [ IF NOT EXISTS ] [
schema_name
'.' ]
table_name
FROM LOADER
function_name
'(' [
arg1_val
[ ,
arg2_val
] [, ... ] ] ')'
    [ WITH [ NO ] DATA ]
